## Outcome

What user or developer outcome does this change create?

## Changes

- Describe the focused change here.

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./... -count=1`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `golangci-lint fmt --diff`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run`
- [ ] Production complexity and 75% coverage gates
- [ ] Relevant real-agent or integration smoke test, when behavior changed

## Safety and documentation

- [ ] No credentials, private memory, raw private logs, or unrelated changes
- [ ] README/docs updated for behavior, configuration, or architecture changes
- [ ] Disable, upgrade, and rollback behavior considered for integration changes
